modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues connecting smart devices to the wireless network.

full_description_text: 
The user is trying to connect their new Smart TV to the wireless network but is unsure how to do it. They mentioned that their device doesn't have a wired Ethernet port, which makes things a bit tricky. They also expressed some confusion about the Wi-Fi settings, especially since their device doesn't support WPA2 Enterprise. It seems like they just want to enjoy streaming their favorite shows without any hassle!
